approach: Group specs by mtime into Active/Earlier, spin spec node on step click, remove static circles
last_action: Phase 2 complete — tests (19 new, 80 total passing) and README updated
decisions: Used 'pulse' icon for Active group and 'archive' for Earlier group
Kept DocumentStatus type and getDocumentStatus for tooltip use even though circles removed

T001.did: Added getSpecMaxMtime/isToday helpers, partitioned specs into Active/Earlier groups with spec-group contextValue

T002.did: Removed STATUS_INDICATORS constant and all circle description assignments from SpecItem constructor

T003.did: Added activeSpecName property, setActiveSpec method, isActive param to SpecItem for sync~spin icon

T004.did: Passed specExplorer into registerPhaseCommands, call setActiveSpec with spec name before executing step

T005.did: Added 19 unit tests covering grouping, mtime, active state, icons, and loading

T006.did: Updated README Sidebar at a Glance section with Active/Earlier grouping and spinning indicator docs

specify.key_finding: specExplorerProvider already uses sync~spin ThemeIcon for loading state and STATUS_INDICATORS dict controls circle symbols in step descriptions

plan.approach_summary: Group specs by mtime into Active/Earlier, spin spec node on step click, remove static circles
risks: File mtime can be affected by git operations causing specs to shift groups unexpectedly — low risk since specs live in .claude/ which is typically gitignored
